title: berkheya draco
intro: Berkheya draco, also known as the Dragon's Head or Cape Dragon's Head, is a plant species native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. It is a flowering plant of the Asteraceae family, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Berkheya draco is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
